tools.name: accessPreview.createAccessPreview
tools.description: Creates an access preview that allows you to preview IAM Access Analyzer findings for your resource before deploying resource permissions.

tools.name: accessPreview.getAccessPreview
tools.description: Retrieves information about an access preview for the specified analyzer.

tools.name: accessPreview.listAccessPreviewFindings
tools.description: Retrieves a list of access preview findings generated by the specified access preview.

tools.name: accessPreviewAnalyzerArn.listAccessPreviews
tools.description: Retrieves a list of access previews for the specified analyzer.

tools.name: analyzedResource.listAnalyzedResources
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resources of the specified type that have been analyzed by the specified analyzer..

tools.name: analyzedResourceAnalyzerArnResourceArn.getAnalyzedResource
tools.description: Retrieves information about a resource that was analyzed.

tools.name: analyzer.createAnalyzer
tools.description: Creates an analyzer for your account.

tools.name: analyzer.createArchiveRule
tools.description:
Creates an archive rule for the specified analyzer. Archive rules automatically archive new findings that meet the criteria you define when you create the rule.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to create an archive rule, see IAM Access Analyzer filter keys in the IAM User Guide.

tools.name: analyzer.deleteAnalyzer
tools.description: Deletes the specified analyzer. When you delete an analyzer, IAM Access Analyzer is disabled for the account or organization in the current or specific Region. All findings that were generated by the analyzer are deleted. You cannot undo this action.

tools.name: analyzer.deleteArchiveRule
tools.description: Deletes the specified archive rule.

tools.name: analyzer.getAnalyzer
tools.description: Retrieves information about the specified analyzer.

tools.name: analyzer.getArchiveRule
tools.description:
Retrieves information about an archive rule.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to create an archive rule, see IAM Access Analyzer filter keys in the IAM User Guide.

tools.name: analyzer.listAnalyzers
tools.description: Retrieves a list of analyzers.

tools.name: analyzer.listArchiveRules
tools.description: Retrieves a list of archive rules created for the specified analyzer.

tools.name: analyzer.updateArchiveRule
tools.description: Updates the criteria and values for the specified archive rule.

tools.name: archiveRule.applyArchiveRule
tools.description: Retroactively applies the archive rule to existing findings that meet the archive rule criteria.

tools.name: finding.getFinding
tools.description: Retrieves information about the specified finding.

tools.name: finding.listFindings
tools.description:
Retrieves a list of findings generated by the specified analyzer.

To learn about filter keys that you can use to retrieve a list of findings, see IAM Access Analyzer filter keys in the IAM User Guide.

tools.name: finding.updateFindings
tools.description: Updates the status for the specified findings.

tools.name: policy.cancelPolicyGeneration
tools.description: Cancels the requested policy generation.

tools.name: policy.getGeneratedPolicy
tools.description: Retrieves the policy that was generated using StartPolicyGeneration.

tools.name: policy.listPolicyGenerations
tools.description: Lists all of the policy generations requested in the last seven days.

tools.name: policy.startPolicyGeneration
tools.description: Starts the policy generation request.

tools.name: policy.validatePolicy
tools.description: Requests the validation of a policy and returns a list of findings. The findings help you identify issues and provide actionable recommendations to resolve the issue and enable you to author functional policies that meet security best practices.

tools.name: resource.startResourceScan
tools.description: Immediately starts a scan of the policies applied to the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieves a list of tags applied to the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds a tag to the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes a tag from the specified resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
